projects.title: GardaWorld HRMS
projects.subtitle: Human Resource Management System
projects.problem: Thousands of employee records managed on paper with no access control, no audit trail, and no way to query history.
projects.contribution: Designed the full system architecture, role-based access control, database schema, and AWS S3 file management pipeline.

projects.title: M-Pesa STK Push
projects.subtitle: Payment Integration Module
projects.problem: Businesses needed a reliable way to trigger mobile payments programmatically without manual customer input.
projects.contribution: Built a Laravel package wrapping the Safaricom Daraja API, handling callbacks, timeouts, and transaction logging.

projects.title: Role-Based Auth System
projects.subtitle: Authorization & Permission Engine
projects.problem: Standard Laravel auth does not handle multi-role permission structures with granular resource-level control.
projects.contribution: Designed a permission matrix system with role inheritance, middleware guards, and a UI for managing access without code changes.

projects.title: Data Encryption Layer
projects.subtitle: Field-Level Encryption for Laravel
projects.problem: Sensitive fields in database tables were stored in plain text, exposing PII in the event of a breach.
projects.contribution: Implemented AES-256 field-level encryption via Laravel model casting, with key rotation support and searchable encrypted indexes.
